x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Trained NLU models power Now Assist intent recognition. Untrained or low-accuracy models produce poor intent matching and degrade conversational AI quality.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Train NLU models with representative utterances for each topic. Target: 80%+ of active models trained with accuracy above 85%. Retrain after adding new topics or utterances.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c1b
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Trained NLU models power Now Assist intent recognition. Untrained or low-accuracy models produce poor intent matching and degrade conversational AI quality.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>NLU Model Training Status</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("sys_nlu_model");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sys_nlu_model not found", finding: "NLU Model table (sys_nlu_model) is not available. Verify the Virtual Agent plugin is active." };
    }
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("sys_nlu_model");
    gaTotal.addQuery("active", true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: "not_applicable", actualValue: "No active NLU models found", finding: "No active NLU models found. NLU training status cannot be assessed — configure NLU models for VA topic intent recognition." };
    }
    var gaTrained = new GlideAggregate("sys_nlu_model");
    gaTrained.addQuery("active", true);
    gaTrained.addQuery("state", "trained");
    gaTrained.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaTrained.query();
    var trained = gaTrained.next() ? parseInt(gaTrained.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var pct = Math.round((trained / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = trained + " of " + total + " active NLU models trained (" + pct + "%)";
    if (pct >= 80) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of active NLU models are trained. Now Assist intent recognition has accurate model coverage." };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: (total - trained) + " of " + total + " NLU models are untrained (" + pct + "% trained, target: 80%+). Now Assist intent matching accuracy will be reduced for topics without trained models." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of NLU models are trained. Now Assist intent recognition requires trained NLU models — untrained models produce poor AI matching accuracy." };
    }
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>VIRTUAL_AGENT</module>
<number>CHK0006129</number>
<order>40</order>
<remediation_guidance>Train NLU models with representative utterances for each topic. Target: 80%+ of active models trained with accuracy above 85%. Retrain after adding new topics or utterances.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>8e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c1b</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
